SEARCH
Package taskmanager.api

Interface TaskManager.TaskManagerBuilder

All Known Implementing Classes:
DefaultTaskManagerBuilder
Enclosing interface:
TaskManager
public static interface TaskManager.TaskManagerBuilder
Builder interface for constructing a TaskManager instance step-by-step. This follows the Builder design pattern to allow flexible configuration.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    TaskManager
    build()
    Builds and returns the final TaskManager instance.
    TaskManager.TaskManagerBuilder
    withStoragePath(String path)
    Sets the storage path for task persistence (optional).
    TaskManager.TaskManagerBuilder
    withWeatherApiKey(String apiKey)
    Sets the API key used for weather service integration.

  • Method Details

    • withWeatherApiKey

      TaskManager.TaskManagerBuilder withWeatherApiKey(String apiKey)
      Sets the API key used for weather service integration.
      Parameters:
      apiKey - the weather API key
      Returns:
      the builder instance

    • withStoragePath

      TaskManager.TaskManagerBuilder withStoragePath(String path)
      Sets the storage path for task persistence (optional).
      Parameters:
      path - file system path for storing data
      Returns:
      the builder instance

    • build

      TaskManager build()
      Builds and returns the final TaskManager instance.
      Returns:
      a fully configured TaskManager
